name: metrix-plugin
description: metrix-plugin marketplace · TeamAgent: capture corrections in one Claude Code session, block repeats in the next, prove it to the CEO.

plugins.name: teamagent-memory
plugins.description: Capture user corrections as rule cards in one session and block the same mistake from repeating in the next via PreToolUse, Stop, and UserPromptSubmit hooks.

plugins.name: teamagent-proof-console
plugins.description: Generate CEO-grade proof packets (transcript, rule card, hook event, before/after) and run /ceo-start to render the full TeamAgent story as a talk-html zh-CN page. Bundles the 10 anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins data skills (SQL, EDA, viz, dashboards, validation) so proofs can include real data evidence.

plugins.name: teamagent-team-sync
plugins.description: Publish project rules to the team, resolve rule conflicts across machines, and promote local rule cards to shared team rules via SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit hooks.

plugins.name: teamagent-workflow
plugins.description: Issue → grill → implement → proof handoff workflow. Claim a GitHub issue, auto-generate chatgpt.com and claude.ai grill-me session URLs, hand off implementation, and write proof links back to the PR via gh pr comment.
